title: dupatya granatensis
intro: Dupatya granatensis, also known as Granada lavender, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Dupatya granatensis include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and relieving symptoms of insomnia. Herbal preparations of Dupatya granatensis include essential oils, teas, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
